parsers.name: Remove invisible characters
parsers.description: Removes zero-width and most control characters while keeping new lines and tabs.

parsers.name: Normalize spaces
parsers.description: Replaces non-breaking spaces and repeated spaces with normal spaces, then trims each line.

parsers.name: Unwrap broken lines
parsers.description: Joins wrapped imported lines into paragraphs and joins hyphenated words.

params.label: Min line length
params.description: Minimum line length used when deciding whether a line is part of a wrapped paragraph.

parsers.name: Two fixed columns
parsers.description: Splits fixed-width two-column text into one text flow.

params.label: Left width
params.description: Number of characters in the left column.

params.label: Gap width
params.description: Number of characters between the left and right columns.

params.label: Right width
params.description: Number of characters in the right column.

parsers.name: Trim trailing spaces
parsers.description: Removes spaces and tabs from the end of each code line without changing indentation.
